title: PreKitted
description: With this mod, you can fully gear up in seconds simply run one command and you’re ready to go!
body:
## What you can expect from this mod!

Have you ever wanted to get an kit in just 1 command?
Well Then PreKitted is the best mod for you!

To get a sword kit just do


```
/sword
```
For an Axe kit do


```
/axe
```
For an Hoplite mace kit do


```
/Hoplite_mace
```

To Clear your kit just do


```
/kitclear
```

## What can you still expect from this mod

Soon we will be adding:
- More Kits
- Custom Kits
- Battle arena's for each kit!

## Note from the Owner!

Make shure to check out my other mods also [Dinners revamped mod](https://modrinth.com/project/pTrcudPD) and also [Bottle it mod](https://modrinth.com/project/dADKESDc).

If i were you I would follow this project because Its going to become wild!

_Sidenote all my mods are incompatable with eachother for some reason :sob:._
